items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #2' requires deterministic validation of the scenario 'Prorated upgrade mid-cycle'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or state checks that confirm the behavior of the system in this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence to support the expected outcome, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
